description: Phishing templates exploiting healthcare anxiety and HIPAA compliance

templates.name: Patient Portal Security Alert
suggested_subject_lines: Security Alert: Unusual access to your patient records
Action Required: Verify your patient portal account
MyChart: Suspicious login detected on your account

templates.name: Insurance Verification Request
suggested_subject_lines: Action Required: Your insurance verification is incomplete
Insurance coverage update needed before your appointment
Your health insurance information needs to be verified

templates.name: HIPAA Compliance Alert
suggested_subject_lines: HIPAA Compliance: Mandatory training due by Friday
Compliance Alert: Your HIPAA certification has expired
Required: Complete HIPAA security awareness update
templates.notes: Best for healthcare sector employees. The regulatory authority of HIPAA creates strong urgency.
